_comment: orb_collect.json — verifies orb collection through the controller. A p1 piece at (4,5) is adjacent to an orb at (4,4) with power_id 'raise_tile'. Inputs: select the piece, move it onto the orb tile, then re-select to trigger the power menu. After running: state.json must show the piece at (4,4) with powers=['raise_tile'] and orbs=[].
